office_does: The sheriff leads patrol, investigations, jail operations, staffing, and public safety.
race_blurb: Appointed Sheriff Jodie Barcus faces deputy Gisberth Gonzalez.

candidates.summary: County deputy with more than 17 years of jail, patrol, tactical, and training experience.
highlights: Emphasizes proactive policing, transparency, and trust [S2]

safety.basis: Proactive policing supports a modest enforcement placement.

experience.basis: More than 17 years across operational roles establish a substantial record.

candidates.summary: Appointed sheriff with tribal-police, deputy, sergeant, and chief-deputy experience.
highlights: Proposes proactive enforcement, rural patrol, rehabilitation, and staff development [S2]

safety.basis: The platform combines proactive enforcement with jail rehabilitation, supporting both poles.

experience.basis: Current command and successive supervisory roles establish a strong record, though elected tenure is new.
